; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-04-11T17:42:15Z

AFFECT [[1658694193319203921]]
    IMPORT [[7081846004279]] [[180927.180926]]

    TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
            property ~&214620122227&~ finiteCanvas: rmitchellscottSettings.finiteCanvas
            property ~&214620122227&~ finiteCanvasPortraitMargins: rmitchellscottSettings.finiteCanvasPortraitMargins

            ~&6502786168&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: rmitchellscottSettings
                property ~&6503679477&~ finiteCanvas: ~&6504329801&~
                property ~&6503679477&~ finiteCanvasPortraitMargins: ~&6504329801&~

                ~&7712198086779994&~ {
                    ~&7712874798136519&~: "rmitchellscott"
                    property ~&214620122227&~ finiteCanvas: rmitchellscottSettings.finiteCanvas
                    property ~&214620122227&~ finiteCanvasPortraitMargins: rmitchellscottSettings.finiteCanvasPortraitMargins
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

; Toggle in Display settings
AFFECT [[12656844379588783144]]
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[6504254477]] > [[8398580812105622257]]#[[254529542087036966]] > [[6502786168]]#[[486471031355863065]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[7082545991543]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[7712155293725601]]
        INSERT {
            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: finiteCanvasPanel
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Finite canvas")
                ~&478136262235079021&~: ~&6504222003&~("Constrain notebook scrolling and zoom to the paper size.")

                ~&7082453764199&~: ~&12858967014938070090&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: finiteCanvasToggle
                    ~&233723734822480&~: ~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas
                    ~&2132408976983288956&~.~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas = !~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas
                }
            }

            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: portraitMarginsPanel
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&8399743405844438450&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&214632782036&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas
                ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Limit landscape to portrait margins")
                ~&478136262235079021&~: ~&6504222003&~("Keep the same zoom constraint in landscape as portrait.")

                ~&7082453764199&~: ~&12858967014938070090&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: portraitMarginsToggle
                    ~&233723734822480&~: ~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvasPortraitMargins
                    ~&2132408976983288956&~.~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvasPortraitMargins = !~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvasPortraitMargins
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

; Scroll and zoom clamping for note pages when finiteCanvas is enabled
AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]

        REBUILD [[15251853890601260460]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { 0.5 * ~&254551912358044556&~ }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&8399340108982949229&~ ? (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvasPortraitMargins || ~&495572996767745525&~?.~&14593461789319363686&~ ? (~&254551912363007396&~ / ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~.~&7082729686082&~)) * ~&254551912358044556&~ : ~&15777890623490054006&~) : 0.5 * ~&254551912358044556&~) }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[10624900005078842211]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&15777890623490054006&~ * 1.05 }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&7713361680718652&~ ? ~&15251853890601260460&~ : ~&15777890623490054006&~) * 1.05 }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[16532741761898666357]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&15777890623490054006&~ * 0.95 }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&7713361680718652&~ ? ~&15251853890601260460&~ : ~&15777890623490054006&~) * 0.95 }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[9085359462190807404]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&6504254477&~.~&254547437090201330&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&6504254477&~.~&4161556510681018511&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~); }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~) {
                    ~&214622607920&~ ~&486388977411420560&~ = !~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~?.~&14593461789319363686&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (!~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvasPortraitMargins && ~&486388977411420560&~) {
                        ~&6504254477&~.~&254547437090201330&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&6504254477&~.~&4161556510681018511&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~);
                    } ~&6503784146&~ {
                        ~&214622607920&~ pcr = ~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~;
                        ~&214622607920&~ ~&214641137009&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&15251853890601260460&~;
                        ~&214622607920&~ vh = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / ~&214641137009&~;
                        ~&214622607920&~ topY = pcr.~&180994&~ + vh / 2;
                        ~&6504254477&~.~&254547437090201330&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&6504254477&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180993&~, topY), ~&214641137009&~);
                    }
                } ~&6503784146&~ {
                    ~&6504254477&~.~&254547437090201330&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&6504254477&~.~&4161556510681018511&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~);
                }
            }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[10790638415792638956]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&197091758&~ ~&7082897875483&~ = ~&214625660372&~; }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&197091758&~ ~&7082897875483&~ = ~&214625660372&~; ~&214622607920&~ noteScale = (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~) ? ~&6504254477&~.~&15251853890601260460&~ : ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~; }

            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&5972376&~ (~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~ < ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~) }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&5972376&~ (~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~ < noteScale) }

            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&6504391364&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&9481895658197487008&~ ? ~&6504254477&~.~&4161556510681018511&~ : ~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~); }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&6504391364&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&9481895658197487008&~ ? ~&6504254477&~.~&4161556510681018511&~ : ~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~, noteScale); }

            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&5972376&~ (~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~ > ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~) }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&5972376&~ (~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~ > noteScale) }

            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~); }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { noteScale); }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[6504541966]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&5972376&~ ((~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~ < ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~ && ~&214641137009&~ > ~&16532741761898666357&~) }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&214622607920&~ noteScale = (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~) ? ~&6504254477&~.~&15251853890601260460&~ : ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~; ~&5972376&~ ((~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~ < noteScale && ~&214641137009&~ > ~&16532741761898666357&~) }

            LOCATE BEFORE { || (~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~ > ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~ && ~&214641137009&~ < ~&10624900005078842211&~)) }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { || (~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~ > noteScale && ~&214641137009&~ < ~&10624900005078842211&~)) }

            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&214641137009&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~; }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&214641137009&~ = noteScale; }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[11338115863957233666]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&254547437090201330&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&8400080725267989564&~.~&180993&~, ~&502817364213021138&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180994&~ - ~&7712927726759444&~.~&180994&~), ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~) }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&254547437090201330&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&8400080725267989564&~.~&180993&~, ~&502817364213021138&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180994&~ - ~&7712927726759444&~.~&180994&~), (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~) ? ~&6504254477&~.~&15251853890601260460&~ : ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~) }

            LOCATE AFTER { ~&502817364213021138&~.~&8399804544299345782&~(~&7712927726759444&~) ; }
            INSERT {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~) {
                    ~&214622607920&~ pcr = ~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ ~&5972746&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&502817364213021138&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ vw = ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ / ~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ vh = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / ~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ pageW = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(pcr.~&214646099849&~, pcr.~&7082729686082&~);
                    ~&214622607920&~ ~&486388977411420560&~ = !~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~?.~&14593461789319363686&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ pageH = (!~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvasPortraitMargins && ~&486388977411420560&~) ? pageW : ~&6502909715&~.~&197092719&~(pcr.~&214646099849&~, pcr.~&7082729686082&~);
                    ~&214622607920&~ halfW = pageW / 2;
                    ~&214622607920&~ ~&5972196&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092719&~(-halfW + vw / 2, ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(halfW - vw / 2, ~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180993&~));
                    ~&214622607920&~ ~&5972197&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092719&~(pcr.~&180994&~ + vh / 2, ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(pcr.~&180994&~ + pageH - vh / 2, ~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180994&~));
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&5972196&~ !== ~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180993&~ || ~&5972197&~ !== ~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180994&~) {
                        ~&254547437090201330&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&5972196&~, ~&5972197&~), ~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~);
                    }
                }
            }

            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&5972376&~ (~&501502831119479302&~ && (~&180973&~.~&500992174017560777&~ === ~&254550717068498203&~ || ~&502817364213021138&~.~&214641137009&~ === ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~)) }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&5972376&~ (~&501502831119479302&~ && (~&180973&~.~&500992174017560777&~ === ~&254550717068498203&~ || ~&502817364213021138&~.~&214641137009&~ === ((~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~) ? ~&6504254477&~.~&15251853890601260460&~ : ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~))) }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[8400065979606589904]]
            LOCATE AFTER { ~&6504254477&~.~&502817364213021138&~.~&8399804544299345782&~ }
            LOCATE AFTER { ) ; }
            INSERT {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~) {
                    ~&214622607920&~ pcr = ~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ ~&5972746&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&502817364213021138&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ vh = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / ~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ ~&486388977411420560&~ = !~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~?.~&14593461789319363686&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ pageH = (!~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvasPortraitMargins && ~&486388977411420560&~) ? ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(pcr.~&214646099849&~, pcr.~&7082729686082&~) : ~&6502909715&~.~&197092719&~(pcr.~&214646099849&~, pcr.~&7082729686082&~);
                    ~&214622607920&~ ~&6504059816&~ = pcr.~&180994&~ + pageH - vh / 2;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180994&~ > ~&6504059816&~) {
                        ~&254547437090201330&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180993&~, ~&6504059816&~), ~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~);
                    }
                }
            }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[7713559209923965]]
            LOCATE AFTER { ~&6504254477&~.~&502817364213021138&~.~&8399804544299345782&~ }
            LOCATE AFTER { ) ; }
            INSERT {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~) {
                    ~&214622607920&~ pcr = ~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ ~&5972746&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&502817364213021138&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ vh = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / ~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~;
                    ~&214622607920&~ minY = pcr.~&180994&~ + vh / 2;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180994&~ < minY) {
                        ~&254547437090201330&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&5972746&~.~&7082534202858&~.~&180993&~, minY), ~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~);
                    }
                }
            }
        END REBUILD

    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[254480451320573660]]#[[18007182163571081861]] > [[254502432014417618]]#[[6504391364]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&17742136325200165396&~: {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~) {
                    ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~) {
                            ~&214622607920&~ ~&214641137009&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&15251853890601260460&~;
                            ~&214622607920&~ pcr = ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~;
                            ~&214622607920&~ vh = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / ~&214641137009&~;
                            ~&214622607920&~ topY = pcr.~&180994&~ + vh / 2;
                            ~&6504391364&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&6504391364&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180993&~, topY), ~&214641137009&~);
                            ~&6504254477&~.~&2491156027386016279&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }

            ~&13733777459642361598&~: {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~) {
                    ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~) {
                            ~&214622607920&~ ~&214641137009&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&15251853890601260460&~;
                            ~&214622607920&~ pcr = ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~;
                            ~&214622607920&~ vh = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / ~&214641137009&~;
                            ~&214622607920&~ topY = pcr.~&180994&~ + vh / 2;
                            ~&6504391364&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&6504391364&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180993&~, topY), ~&214641137009&~);
                            ~&6504254477&~.~&2491156027386016279&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }

            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~
                function ~&4934706584521522300&~() {
                    ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~) {
                            ~&214622607920&~ ~&214641137009&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&15251853890601260460&~;
                            ~&214622607920&~ pcr = ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~;
                            ~&214622607920&~ vh = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / ~&214641137009&~;
                            ~&214622607920&~ topY = pcr.~&180994&~ + vh / 2;
                            ~&6504391364&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&6504391364&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180993&~, topY), ~&214641137009&~);
                            ~&6504254477&~.~&2491156027386016279&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[254480451320573660]]#[[2632216410667939968]] > [[7792976629833250715]]#[[18399528329672988301]]
        REPLACE [[16549593983016722507]] WITH {
            ~&16549593983016722507&~: ~&6504329801&~
            ~&7423979105314499411&~: ~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas && ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~
            ~&8399923448980225585&~: {
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas || !~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ || !~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(-10000, -10000, 20000, 20000);
                ~&214622607920&~ pcr = ~&6504254477&~.~&8399340108982949229&~.~&13955160320170978486&~;
                ~&214622607920&~ pageW = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(pcr.~&214646099849&~, pcr.~&7082729686082&~);
                ~&214622607920&~ pageH = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092719&~(pcr.~&214646099849&~, pcr.~&7082729686082&~);
                ~&214622607920&~ topLeft = ~&502817364213021138&~.~&500997885514268021&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(-pageW / 2, pcr.~&180994&~));
                ~&214622607920&~ bottomRight = ~&502817364213021138&~.~&500997885514268021&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(pageW / 2, pcr.~&180994&~ + pageH));
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(topLeft.~&180993&~, topLeft.~&180994&~, bottomRight.~&180993&~ - topLeft.~&180993&~, bottomRight.~&180994&~ - topLeft.~&180994&~);
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[6502786168]] > [[6502786168]]#[[254550477519892873]] > [[214604601930]]#[[6037953132106709746]]
        REPLACE [[233743626668842]] WITH {
            ~&233743626668842&~: (~&7082020628281&~.finiteCanvas ? ~&214625660372&~ : ~&14181763546168008551&~.~&7712938630327660&~ || ~&1680526189435715738&~.~&7712938630327660&~)
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
